Service Hub
Service Hub®
Customer Service Software
Customer service software powered by AI to scale support and drive customer retention.
Get a demo
of HubSpot's service software
Start 14-day free trial
of HubSpot's service tools
Business Solutions
Customer service and retention, powered by AI
Service Hub is AI-powered, omni-channel, and connected to marketing and sales data on a unified customer platform. The result? Easily scalable customer support and proactive customer retention that fuels your business growth.
Scale Support Teams With AI
Scale support without adding headcount. Use intelligent routing and custom views to manage tickets. Track performance with SLAs and real-time analytics to keep customers satisfied.
Help Desk Workspace
Deliver personalized and omni-channel customer support at scale with an AI-powered help desk and ticketing workspace.
Omnichannel Communication
Meet your customers wherever they are by providing personalized support across every channel.
Call Tracking
Create sophisticated call flows with interactive voice response phone trees, enable team routing and transfers, and deliver seamless phone support at scale.
SLA Management
Keep response times low and customers happy with automated ticket routing.
Service Analytics
Uncover key insights with out-of-the-box reports that help you measure team performance and customer satisfaction in real time.
Automated Customer Service
Help your team solve customer issues faster with AI-powered automation that handles routine tasks and support requests.
View more
Drive Retention With Unified Tools
With Service Hub’s connected data, you can identify opportunities to upsell or cross-sell, track customer satisfaction trends, and drive proactive customer retention.
Customer Success Workspace
Manage your book of business, build unique customer health scores, and help your reps prioritize their activities.
Feedback Management
Understand what your customers really think with customizable NPS, CSAT, and customer feedback surveys.
Conversation Intelligence
Learn from every customer interaction with AI-powered call analytics.
Fully Integrated Smart CRM
Give your success team instant access to every support interaction, deal stage, and marketing touchpoint in one connected system.
Smart Deal Progression (Beta)
Identify upsell opportunities and strengthen retention with AI-generated follow-ups from every service interaction.
View more
Scale Support Self-Service with AI
Built-in AI tools make the most of your CRM data to support your customers 24/7.
Knowledge Base
Enable customer self-service and reduce incoming tickets while maintaining 24/7 support availability.
Customer Portal
Empower customers to get the help they need through a secure customer portal.
Breeze Customer Agent
Resolve customer inquiries across email and live chat 24/7 with customizable AI automation.
Breeze Knowledge Base Agent (Beta)
Automatically convert successful support interactions into self- service resources that help customers find answers faster.
Breeze Prospecting Agent
Surface signals, pull customer context, and guide outreach next steps with an AI agent for customer growth.
View more
Customer Proof
See all case studies
Real Growth, Real Stories
How real customer service teams are using AI tools to scale support and drive retention.
Customer ROI
Download the ROI report
to learn more

*Discount available for new customers only. Offer available for a limited time. For more detailed information on product packaging and the limits that apply, please see our
pricing page
. Price shown in USD and subject to applicable tax.
Frequently Asked Questions
What is customer service software?
Customer service software is the consolidation point for managing the customer journey. It allows you to manage the onboarding of new customers; collect, organize, and respond to customer support requests; and ensure the growth and satisfaction of your customers.
While most customer service software solutions solve for a specific use case, Service Hub is unique in that it's part of the HubSpot customer platform. With features that make it easy to deliver authentic, personalized service, Service Hub empowers you to prioritize the customer experience.
Can I implement HubSpot’s software without dedicated programmers/developers?
Yes. With automation and contextual guidance built right in, you can get started with Service Hub without involving developers. And if you’re looking for more customization and expertise, our
solutions partners
offer a wide range of specialized support to help you get the most out of your HubSpot implementation.
Will HubSpot help me and my team get started with the software?
Of course! We’ll help all Starter, Professional, and Enterprise users get up and running quickly with a personalized onboarding plan, and our implementation specialists are available to provide guidance on technical setup. Your whole team of free or paid users will also have access to our active community forums, training lessons from HubSpot Academy, and a comprehensive knowledge base of user guides and help documents. For especially complex configurations, businesses also leverage HubSpot’s
expansive ecosystem of over 6,000 partners
for additional support.
What makes HubSpot’s customer service software popular?
While
Service Hub
stands out for the power and ease of use of its support and help desk features, it’s also popular for the way it helps you
manage customer success
. With channels to meet customers where they are and when they need it, Service Hub lets you have contextualized and perso

analysis.name: HubSpot Service Hub
analysis.tagline: AI-Powered Customer Service Platform for Growing Teams
analysis.value_proposition: Scale customer support and drive retention with an AI-powered help desk built on the HubSpot CRM platform.
analysis.ideal_customer: Growing customer service teams already using (or adopting) the HubSpot Customer Platform for unified marketing, sales, and support.

features.name: ai customer agent
features.description: AI agent that resolves customer queries 24/7 at scale.
features.evidence_quote: Resolve customer queries 24/7 ... Scale customer service with an AI customer agent.

features.name: help desk
features.description: Central help desk workspace for support agents to manage tickets.
features.evidence_quote: Support customers at scale with AI and a help desk.

features.name: ticketing
features.description: Ticket management for tracking and resolving customer issues.
features.evidence_quote: Customer service software

features.name: customer health scoring
features.description: Identify opportunities to improve customer health and retention.
features.evidence_quote: Drive retention ... Identify opportunities to improve customer health.

features.name: breeze ai platform
features.description: AI agents and features that power the entire HubSpot platform including Service Hub.
features.evidence_quote: Breeze ... AI agents and features that power the entire platform

features.name: breeze assistant
features.description: In-workflow AI assistant embedded across HubSpot tools.
features.evidence_quote: Breeze Assistant steps further into your workflows

features.name: smart crm integration
features.description: Native connection to HubSpot Smart CRM as the unified customer record.
features.evidence_quote: Smart CRM ... AI-powered, flexible CRM software

features.name: knowledge base
features.description: Self-service knowledge base for customers (standard help desk capability).
features.evidence_quote: HubSpot Knowledge Base

features.name: omnichannel support
features.description: Support across email, chat, and other channels via unified inbox.
features.evidence_quote: Scale support ... Support customers at scale with AI and a help desk.

features.name: marketplace integrations
features.description: Connect third-party apps via the HubSpot Marketplace.
features.evidence_quote: HubSpot Marketplace ... Connect your favorite apps to HubSpot

features.name: developer api
features.description: Public APIs for building custom apps and integrations.
features.evidence_quote: date-based API versioning, the new /YYYY-MM/ format introduced across HubSpot's APIs

features.name: mcp server
features.description: Remote HubSpot MCP server allowing MCP-compatible AI agents to read/write HubSpot data.
features.evidence_quote: The remote HubSpot MCP server is graduating from beta and is now generally available

features.name: agent cli
features.description: Command-line interface purpose-built for AI agents to interact with HubSpot CRM data.
features.evidence_quote: HubSpot Agent CLI is a new command-line interface purpose-built for AI agents

features.name: workflow automation
features.description: Automate service processes, ticket routing, and follow-ups.
features.evidence_quote: Automate marketing ... Create campaigns with automation and AI.

features.name: reporting and analytics
features.description: Ticket closure rate and service performance reporting.
features.evidence_quote: 37% improvement in ticket closure rates

features.name: unified customer platform
features.description: Service Hub sits on one platform with Marketing, Sales, Content, Data, and Revenue Hubs.
features.evidence_quote: All of HubSpot's marketing, sales, and customer service software on one agentic platform.

features.name: premium support
features.description: Paid premium support services offering for HubSpot customers.
features.evidence_quote: Premium Support

features.name: onboarding services
features.description: Paid onboarding and migration services.
features.evidence_quote: Services ... Onboarding ... Migration

features.name: solutions partner ecosystem
features.description: Network of solutions partners for implementation and consulting.
features.evidence_quote: Hire a Solutions Partner

features.name: multi-language support
features.description: Product UI available in 17+ languages including EN, ES, DE, FR, PT, JP, ZH.
features.evidence_quote: English ... Español Deutsch 日本語 Português Français Nederlands Italiano Polski Svenska Suomi

features.name: aeo tools
features.description: Answer engine optimization tools that track and improve brand visibility in AI results (beta).
features.evidence_quote: AEO (Beta) ... Answer engine optimization tools that track and improve your brand's visibility in AI results

features.name: small business bundle
features.description: Starter edition bundle of all Hubs for startups and small businesses.
features.evidence_quote: Small Business Bundle ... The Starter edition of each product, built for startups and small businesses

differentiators: All marketing, sales, and customer service software on one agentic platform
129% more leads, 36% more deals closed, and 37% improvement in ticket closure rates after one year
Native Breeze AI agents built across the platform, not bolted on
Remote MCP server GA — any MCP-compatible AI agent can operate on HubSpot data
